calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l AGENTS.md .github/prompts/predict.md schemas/prediction.schema.json schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,220p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,220p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281633 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73281633 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281633 --event evt-petition-disposition; find data/cases/scotus/73281633 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -c data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt && sed -n '1,240p' data/

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"^(INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|TABLE OF CONTENTS|OPINIONS BELOW|JURISDICTION|CONSTITUTIONAL|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|A\\.|B\\.|C\\.)\" data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '277,700p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '701,1100p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1101,1410p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '586,1028p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '201,620p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt && sed -n '621,1000p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt && sed -n '1001,1140p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '526,826p' data/cases/scotus/73281633/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|Second Circuit|By circuit|2025 Term|2024 Term|salience\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"fedcourts query|query --|open-events\" docs/cli.md | head -80 && sed -n '1,220p' docs/cli.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation lookup|case law|legal search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --topic 'commercial speech Central Hudson' --limit 5 --full","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(JSON.stringify(r));

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"Central Hudson\" evidence \"common sense\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (result.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"preliminary injunction\" interlocutory certiorari",filed_before:"2026-07-17",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","procedural_history"]}); for (const c of (result.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.scotus_terms[0:4]' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,360p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; test -e data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z && echo TARGET_EXISTS || echo TARGET_NEW; git status --short","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -A16 -B2 \"codex-baseline\" config .github | head -80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z/prediction.json

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short && find data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && jq -e . data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73281633/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z/tooling.json >/dev/null","workdir":"/home/runner/work
